executive_summary.short_summary: The Ministry shall publish compliance rules within 60 days. All operators must submit quarterly reports. Citizens should receive transparent notices about data use.
key_points: Primary policy themes: governance_policy (38%), compliance_enforcement (21%), data_privacy_security (21%).
Compliance clause identified: The Ministry shall publish compliance rules within 60 days.
Obligation clause identified: All operators must submit quarterly reports.
Ministry is high-impact with role government.
Citizens is medium-impact with role public.
recommended_actions: Create a compliance checklist mapped to all obligation and compliance clauses.
Run targeted stakeholder consultations with: Ministry.

clauses.text: The Ministry shall publish compliance rules within 60 days.
clauses.rationale: References compliance monitoring, enforcement, or violations.

clauses.rationale: Contains mandatory language indicating required action.
